meta.appDescription: Research employers by exploring public GitHub tech stacks.

search.title: Company Tech Stack Explorer
search.subtitle: Enter a GitHub organization slug to see languages, repositories, and contributors.

rateLimit.title: GitHub rate limit
rateLimit.body: Too many requests were sent to the GitHub API from this network. Please wait before trying again.

empty.title: No public repositories
empty.body: This organization exists on GitHub but has no public repositories to analyze.

org.genericError: Something went wrong while loading data.

errors.notFoundBody: We could not find a GitHub organization named “{slug}”. Check the slug and try again.
errors.pageErrorBody: Please try again or return home.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you are looking for does not exist.
